name: Treasure Guardians
description: A mountain rock often seen in the wilds of Nod-Krai. The rocks are so heavy that even a strong man with a sharp tool would struggle to move them. As a result, they are often considered troublesome obstacles during home construction or road-paving. Yet for those small creatures skilled at digging, these rocks, immovable even to larger creatures, are undoubtedly the best "Treasure Guardians."
